LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Stealthboy.description: A chemical addiction to stealthboy use. Long-term presence of the field has caused neurological adaptations at the cellular level, so the brain can no longer function properly without it.\n\nWithout regular stealthboy use, withdrawal symptoms will begin. However, extended abstinence will force the brain to adapt back to its normal state, resolving the addiction.
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Stealthboy.label: Stealthboy Addiction
LanguageData.FCP_Addiction_Stealthboy.stages.1.label: withdrawal
LanguageData.FCP_Crucified.description: This person is immobilized on a power line structure.
LanguageData.FCP_Crucified.label: Crucified
LanguageData.FCP_CrucifixionExhaustion.description: Extreme exhaustion from prolonged immobilization. Slowly reduces consciousness.
LanguageData.FCP_CrucifixionExhaustion.label: Crucifixion Exhaustion
LanguageData.FCP_CrucifixionExhaustion.stages.0.label: early
LanguageData.FCP_CrucifixionExhaustion.stages.1.label: moderate
LanguageData.FCP_CrucifixionExhaustion.stages.2.label: severe
LanguageData.FCP_CrucifixionExhaustion.stages.3.label: extreme
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Power_Armor_Empty_Fusion_Core: Your power armor is out of fusion cores!
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Stealthboy_3001A.description: A modulating stealth field bending light around the user.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Stealthboy_3001A.label: Stealthboy Field (3001A)
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Stealthboy_3001B.description: An improved modulating stealth field with extended duration.
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_Stealthboy_3001B.label: Stealthboy Field (3001B)
LanguageData.FCP_Hediff_ToxHeal.label: Sterilized
LanguageData.FCP_Tolerance_Stealthboy.description: A built-up tolerance to stealthboy use. The more severe this tolerance is, the more stealthboy use it takes to get the same effect.
LanguageData.FCP_Tolerance_Stealthboy.label: Stealthboy Tolerance
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_VatsLink.description: A neurally linked targeting computer which provides the pawn with the RimTech Assisisted Targeting System.
LanguageData.FCP_VATS_VatsLink.label: V.A.T.S. Neural Link
LanguageData.FCP_WasCrucified.description: This person was recently removed from crucifixion. They are weak and traumatized.
LanguageData.FCP_WasCrucified.label: Was Crucified
